name: Add ROSAMachinePool
description: Add a new machine pool to an existing ROSA HCP cluster by creating a MachinePool + ROSAMachinePool pair

playbooks.name: Add Machine Pool
playbooks.description: Creates a MachinePool and ROSAMachinePool resource pair and waits for the pool to become ready

documentation.overview: This test suite adds a new machine pool to an existing ROSA HCP cluster. It creates both the CAPI MachinePool and the ROSAMachinePool infrastructure resource, then waits for the pool to become ready.
prerequisites: An existing ROSA HCP cluster in ready state
MCE/ACM hub cluster with CAPI/CAPA configured

quick_start.description: Adds a machine pool with default settings (m5.xlarge, 1 replica)

customization.cluster_name: Name of the cluster to add the pool to (required)
customization.pool_name: Name for the new machine pool, max 15 chars (required)
customization.availability_zone: AWS availability zone (optional, auto-assigned if omitted)

expected_results: MachinePool resource created in the cluster namespace
ROSAMachinePool resource created with matching infrastructure reference
ROSA provisions new worker nodes in AWS
Pool becomes ready with requested number of replicas (max wait: 30 minutes)
